## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested this change -->

- [ ] `dart format .` applied
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes without errors
- [ ] `flutter test` passes without errors
- [ ] `flutter build web --release` passes without errors
- [ ] Manual verification on Web
- [ ] Manual verification on Android
- [ ] Manual verification on iOS
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior/commands changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and focused
- [ ] No unrelated file changes
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] UI is responsive on mobile and web
- [ ] i18n keys were updated when needed
- [ ] Sentry/logging impact was considered
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
